free_text: Yield of Na-24 from light and intermediate atomic
Productions of Na24 from targets with atomic numbers
between Al and Cu exposed to photon beams with the
maximum energies from 2 up to 5 GeV are analyzed.
To estimate the contribution of the photofission
processes modified RUDSTAM's formula was used.
Comparison of the experimental data with the calculated
results enables one to conclude that the contribution
of the photofission to production of the Na24 nucleus
is substantial for V, Mn, and Cu targets.
Data were published in form of tables.
